channel.title: About on Asra Sakeen Wani
channel.description: Recent content in About on Asra Sakeen Wani

item.title: About
item.description: About Hi! I am Asra.👋🏻 Pronouns: she/her I am a third year PhD student at IIIT-Delhi in the Department of Human-Centered Design. I am advised by Prof Pushpendra Singh as a part of Mélange Lab.

item.title: Contact
item.description: Email: asraw@iiitd.ac.in Mailing Address A-515, Mélange-Lab, R&D Building IIIT-Delhi Okhla Industrial Estate, Phase III, near Govind Puri Metro Station, New Delhi, Delhi 110020 Social Twitter Github
